Our Story

A Cosy Retreat in Makopo

Florrets Bed & Breakfast is a lovingly maintained family-run property set in the peaceful neighbourhood of Makopo, just 1.5 km from Butha-Buthe town centre. Our brick-built rooms are warm and comfortable, surrounded by vibrant flower beds and manicured lawns.

Whether you are a business traveller, a family on a road trip, or a tourist exploring the Butha-Buthe highlands, Florrets offers a genuine home-away-from-home experience with personal service and a hearty breakfast every morning.

Great Location

Makopo village, 1.5 km from town

Full Breakfast

Hearty home-cooked morning meal

Beautiful Gardens

Lush lawns, palms & flower beds

Safe & Secure

Walled compound, secure parking

Easy Process

Book Your Stay in 3 Simple Steps

1

Call or WhatsApp

Reach us at +266 5800 0000 or send a WhatsApp message to check availability for your dates.

2

Choose Your Room

Select from our Standard, Deluxe, or Family rooms. We will confirm your reservation and advise on the deposit.

3

Arrive & Relax

Check in from 12:00 noon. Find us in Makopo, 1.5 km from Butha-Buthe town. Directions provided on booking.

Why Choose Florrets

A Stay Worth Remembering

Genuine Hospitality

Family-run warmth — we treat every guest like a visiting friend. Expect a personal welcome, local tips and a caring touch throughout your stay.

Full Breakfast Included

Start every morning with a satisfying home-cooked breakfast — eggs, toast, fruit, tea or coffee. Fuel up before your day's adventures.

Beautiful Surroundings

Wake up to vibrant gardens with red flowering beds, mature palm trees and a peaceful shaded seating area — nature right on your doorstep.

Tastefully Decorated

From the gold mosaic basin in the bathroom to the floral embroidered bedspreads — every detail is chosen to create a comfortable, elegant atmosphere.

Safe & Secure

Fully walled compound with a security gate, safe on-site parking and 24-hour accessibility so you can always rest easy at Florrets.

Convenient Location

Just 1.5 km from Butha-Buthe town centre and within easy reach of the Butha-Buthe district amenities, shops and local attractions.

Guest Reviews

What Our Guests Say

"

Florrets is an absolute gem. The room was spotless, the garden is gorgeous and breakfast was delicious. Felt completely at home from the moment I arrived. Will definitely return.

TM
Thabo Molefe
Maseru, Lesotho
"

Beautiful property with the most friendly hosts. The floral room was stunning — looked exactly like the photos. The garden seating is perfect for a relaxing evening. Highly recommend!

SN

Johannesburg, SA
"

Clean, comfortable, affordable and warm. The bathroom with the gold basin is unique and beautiful. Easy to find, close to town. Perfect for a business trip to Butha-Buthe. Excellent value.

Peter Lesitsi
Bloemfontein, SA
